label: Get Post Analytics
description: Get total impressions aggregated across platforms or per-post analytics. Use profileUsername for total impressions, or requestId for specific post analytics.

inputs.description: Row variable for Upload Post API key
Row variable for profile username (for total impressions)
Row variable for request ID (for per-post analytics)
Row variable for start date filter (optional, ISO-8601)
Row variable for end date filter (optional, ISO-8601)

outputs.description: Row variable to store the analytics data

formSchema.label: Request ID variable key
formSchema.hint: For per-post analytics. Overrides profileUsername if set.

formSchema.label: Start date variable key (optional)
formSchema.hint: ISO-8601 date for filtering total impressions.

formSchema.label: End date variable key (optional)
formSchema.hint: ISO-8601 date for filtering total impressions.
